name: Construction Wide
description: Figures across a building site — the scale of collective building.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Wide view of a construction site, figures spread across the build.
{setting}. Broad shot of a rising structure, laborers dwarfed by the scale of their work.
{setting}. Wide establishing view of a building site, raw materials and scaffolding throughout.

background_pool: Half-built stone structure rising against the sky, wooden scaffolding climbing its walls, piles of raw lumber and cut stone scattered across the site
Expansive construction site with exposed timber framing, ropes and pulleys, and a crane arm silhouetted against the sky
Open building site with trenches, stacked materials, and the skeleton of a structure reaching upward under an overcast sky
